nextSteps: Install on simulator: install_app_sim({ simulatorId: "SIMULATOR_UUID", appPath: "<TMPDIR>/BundleTest.app" })
Launch on simulator: launch_app_sim({ simulatorId: "SIMULATOR_UUID", bundleId: "com.test.snapshot" })
Install on device: install_app_device({ deviceId: "DEVICE_UDID", appPath: "<TMPDIR>/BundleTest.app" })
Launch on device: launch_app_device({ deviceId: "DEVICE_UDID", bundleId: "com.test.snapshot" })
